title: A Flying Jatt
desc: Aman who is scared of heights, discovers his superpowers when he is forced to face the evil Raka, who is sent by an industrialist to destroy humanity.

title: K3 - Kaali Ka Karishma
desc: A young man, who lives happily with his family but is scared of ghosts, visits Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, with his family. There, he is soon possessed by a vengeful ghost with a sinister past.

title: Laadla
desc: Raju, an upright union leader, can do anything at his wheelchair-bound mother's behest, even if it means breaking his own heart and giving in to a rude heiress.

title: Chaalbaaz
desc: Anju endures mistreatment at home, whereas her long-separated twin Manju boldly navigates life's challenges. By some quirk of fate, they end up trading places, and their worlds erupt in chaos.

title: Koi ... Mil Gaya
desc: A young man with special needs is influenced by his father's scientific work. He encounters an alien who grants him extraordinary abilities and transforms his life.
